focus: Audio & Voice — Engine Sounds + Weapon SFX + Warp Stings + Pilot Voice Packs + Hull Impact Sounds
notes: Hull impact sounds are folded into the weapon_sfx category (Part 7 schema has no explicit hull_impact value) — 6 of the 16 weapon_sfx entries are hull-impact variants, clearly tagged in their names and descriptions.

items.name: Engine Sound Deep Rumble
items.description: Deep low-frequency engine rumble with slow chuff intervals. Feels heavy at idle, meaner at boost.
items.flavor_text: The engine sounds older than the pilot. Possibly wiser. Never asked.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine audio loop asset, deep low-frequency rumble with slow chuff intervals heavy at idle meaner at boost, tactile diesel

items.name: Engine Sound High Whine
items.description: High-pitched turbine whine layered over a mid-range hum. Scales cleanly with throttle input.
items.flavor_text: The whine says the engine is trying. Mostly because it is. Loudly, also.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine audio loop asset, high-pitched turbine whine over mid-range hum scaling with throttle, sharp precise

items.name: Engine Sound Jet Turbine
items.description: Classic jet-turbine spool with combustion wash and a sharp afterburner crack on boost.
items.flavor_text: Sounds like every pilot's first simulator. Nobody outgrows it. They just pretend to.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine audio loop asset, classic jet turbine spool with combustion wash and sharp afterburner crack on boost, aviation nostalgic

items.name: Engine Sound Old Diesel
items.description: Old-diesel engine clatter with visible idle chug and irregular valve ticks. Honest, rough, grounding.
items.flavor_text: Every tick is a part that should have been replaced. None of them have been.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine audio loop asset, old diesel clatter with idle chug and irregular valve ticks, rough honest vintage

items.name: Engine Sound Harmonic Roar
items.description: Harmonically tuned roar with stacked mid-range resonance and a subtle chord structure under the noise.
items.flavor_text: The engine hits a chord. Pilots with perfect pitch refuse to fly behind it anymore.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine audio loop asset, harmonically tuned roar with stacked mid-range resonance and subtle chord structure, musical mechanical

items.name: Engine Sound Whisper-Quiet
items.description: Ultra-quiet engine bed with breathy subsonic pulse and faint mechanical whispers under the hood.
items.flavor_text: The engine works. You can tell because the ship moves. Otherwise, pure silence.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine audio loop asset, ultra-quiet bed with breathy subsonic pulse and faint mechanical whispers, stealth luxurious

items.name: Engine Sound Silent Drive
items.description: Silent-drive engine profile — only a faint crystalline shimmer on acceleration, otherwise indistinguishable from ambient.
items.flavor_text: The engine refuses to announce itself. The ship arrives, later, without permission.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine audio loop asset, silent drive with only faint crystalline shimmer on acceleration, stealth high-tech

items.name: Engine Sound Phased Thrum
items.description: Phased-thrum engine bed with two detuned oscillators beating slowly against each other, subtly animated with throttle.
items.flavor_text: The engine hums in two keys. Neither pilot nor engineer quite remembers installing that.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine audio loop asset, phased thrum bed with two detuned oscillators beating slowly and throttle-reactive modulation, epic exotic

items.name: Weapon SFX Heavy Thump
items.description: Deep chest-level thump on every trigger pull, with a short dry tail. Classic ballistic feel.
items.flavor_text: A sound that carries weight. The opponent feels it in the cockpit, belatedly.
items.art_prompt_hints: weapon sfx asset, deep chest-level thump per trigger pull with short dry tail, ballistic heavy-hitter

items.name: Weapon SFX Laser Zap
items.description: Classic stacked-sine laser zap with a bright descending pitch sweep. Clean, immediate, arcade-direct.
items.flavor_text: The zap was invented before energy weapons. Somehow, the weapons caught up.
items.art_prompt_hints: weapon sfx asset, classic stacked-sine laser zap with bright descending pitch sweep, clean arcade immediate

items.name: Weapon SFX Sharp Crack
items.description: Sharp high-treble crack with a whip-like snap tail. Cuts through every audio bed at the moment of fire.
items.flavor_text: The crack arrives first. The shot arrives second. The opponent last of all.
items.art_prompt_hints: weapon sfx asset, sharp high-treble crack with whip-like snap tail cutting through audio bed, piercing direct

items.name: Weapon SFX Kinetic Punch
items.description: Compressed kinetic punch sound with a solid mid-range thud and a metallic recoil ping afterward.
items.flavor_text: Every shot lands like a door slamming. The ship feels it. So does the pilot.
items.art_prompt_hints: weapon sfx asset, compressed kinetic punch with solid mid-range thud and metallic recoil ping, mechanical weighty

items.name: Weapon SFX Muffled Boom
items.description: Low muffled boom with pillowed mid-range and a slow decay. Distant-feeling despite being your own shot.
items.flavor_text: The boom is padded. The damage is not. The cockpit keeps the peace.
items.art_prompt_hints: weapon sfx asset, low muffled boom with pillowed mid-range and slow decay, distant-feeling weighty

items.name: Weapon SFX Plasma Hiss
items.description: Plasma-weapon hiss with a short sizzle attack, charged-capacitor whine, and a bright spat at the tail.
items.flavor_text: The hiss is the capacitor arguing about efficiency. The pilot keeps winning.
items.art_prompt_hints: weapon sfx asset, plasma hiss with sizzle attack charged-capacitor whine and bright tail spat, energetic exotic

items.name: Weapon SFX Electric Screech
items.description: Abrasive electric screech with a crackling band of static at the top end and a thin high-frequency shriek.
items.flavor_text: The screech is the ship clearing its throat. Pilots in range suddenly remember other appointments.
items.art_prompt_hints: weapon sfx asset, abrasive electric screech with crackling static band and thin high-frequency shriek, harsh aggressive

items.name: Weapon SFX Railgun Snap
items.description: Railgun-style snap with a pre-fire capacitor charge, a sharp crack at release, and a sonic tail receding into the distance.
items.flavor_text: A charge, a crack, a hole. Three steps, always in that order, never in doubt.
items.art_prompt_hints: weapon sfx asset, railgun style snap with pre-fire capacitor charge sharp crack release and receding sonic tail, kinetic premium

items.name: Weapon SFX Crystal Chime
items.description: Crystalline chime-based weapon sfx with shimmering bell harmonics and a soft shattering glass tail on impact.
items.flavor_text: The weapon sings. The target resonates. Both events conclude within a second.
items.art_prompt_hints: weapon sfx asset, crystalline chime with shimmering bell harmonics and soft shattering glass impact tail, musical ethereal rare

items.name: Weapon SFX Ion Whine
items.description: Signature ion-whine weapon sfx with rising modulated frequency sweep, multi-layered crackle, and a deep sub-thump on hit.
items.flavor_text: The whine rises until the target notices. Then it stops, because the point was made.
items.art_prompt_hints: weapon sfx asset, signature ion whine with rising modulated frequency sweep multi-layered crackle and deep sub-thump on hit, epic exotic

items.name: Hull Impact Metal Scream
items.description: Hull impact variant: a high-pitched metal scream with a ragged tail. Plays on every incoming hit against hull.
items.flavor_text: The hull complains loudly. The pilot agrees. Neither party files a report.
items.art_prompt_hints: weapon hull-impact sfx asset, high-pitched metal scream with ragged tail on incoming hull hit, distressed metallic

items.name: Hull Impact Dull Thud
items.description: Hull impact variant: dull compressed thud with very little brightness. Reads as an older, softer hull response.
items.flavor_text: A quiet hit. The kind that does not feel dangerous. The damage report disagrees later.
items.art_prompt_hints: weapon hull-impact sfx asset, dull compressed thud with very little brightness on incoming hit, softened padded

items.name: Hull Impact Muted Gong
items.description: Hull impact variant: a muted gong-like resonance with slow dissipation. Every hit is a small ceremony.
items.flavor_text: The hull tolls like a bell. The pilot starts counting. Stops at seventeen.
items.art_prompt_hints: weapon hull-impact sfx asset, muted gong resonance with slow dissipation on incoming hit, ceremonial muffled

items.name: Hull Impact Shattered Crystal
items.description: Hull impact variant: high crystal shatter layered with a sharp mid-range crack. Reads as panels giving way.
items.flavor_text: The crystal breaks first. The hull later. The pilot pretends they were unrelated events.
items.art_prompt_hints: weapon hull-impact sfx asset, high crystal shatter layered with sharp mid-range crack on incoming hit, panel-failure

items.name: Hull Impact Warped Echo
items.description: Hull impact variant: warped delayed echo with a phase-shifted secondary tail. Reads as strange, premium, unsettling.
items.flavor_text: The hit arrives twice. The second is stranger. The hull stays silent.
items.art_prompt_hints: weapon hull-impact sfx asset, warped delayed echo with phase-shifted secondary tail, unsettling premium rare

items.name: Hull Impact Resonant Crack
items.description: Hull impact variant: a resonant mid-range crack with long ringing decay that couples into the ambient audio bed.
items.flavor_text: The hull keeps humming afterward. The pilot listens. The hull does most of the talking.
items.art_prompt_hints: weapon hull-impact sfx asset, resonant mid-range crack with long ringing decay coupling into ambient bed, rare resonant

items.name: Warp Sting Classic
items.description: Classic warp-sting with a rising swoosh into a bright synthetic pitch bend, then a soft drop on tunnel entry.
items.flavor_text: The sound every pilot learns to associate with arriving anywhere on time. Usually.
items.art_prompt_hints: warp entry audio sting, classic rising swoosh into bright synthetic pitch bend with soft drop on tunnel entry, iconic

items.name: Warp Sting Glass Shatter
items.description: Warp-sting with a glass-shatter transient replacing the classic swoosh. Feels like space cracking open.
items.flavor_text: Space does not actually break. The sound insists otherwise. The pilot plays along.
items.art_prompt_hints: warp entry audio sting, glass-shatter transient replacing classic swoosh, space-cracking brittle premium-feel

items.name: Warp Sting Plasma Roar
items.description: Warp-sting featuring a hot plasma roar at entry, followed by a deep pressure drop and a thin trailing whistle.
items.flavor_text: The gate roars open. The pilot prefers this to doors that ask permission.
items.art_prompt_hints: warp entry audio sting, hot plasma roar at entry with deep pressure drop and thin trailing whistle, aggressive powerful

items.name: Warp Sting Void Echo
items.description: Warp-sting with a cavernous reversed-reverb swell that seems to come from inside the tunnel itself, not outside.
items.flavor_text: The sound arrives from after the warp. Nobody has properly explained that yet.
items.art_prompt_hints: warp entry audio sting, cavernous reversed-reverb swell from inside the tunnel, uncanny premium

items.name: Warp Sting Choral Bloom
items.description: Warp-sting with a wordless vocal choir blooming outward at tunnel entry, underscored by soft harp flourishes.
items.flavor_text: Somebody is singing when the gate opens. Nobody ever identifies the singer. Nobody wants to.
items.art_prompt_hints: warp entry audio sting, wordless vocal choir blooming outward at tunnel entry with soft harp flourish underscore, rare reverent

items.name: Warp Sting Black Tide Rumble
items.description: Signature warp-sting: subsonic black-tide rumble, rising choral tension, and a gut-deep final drop on tunnel exit with tactile low-frequency pulse.
items.flavor_text: The sound is older than warp travel. The engineers politely insist that is impossible.
items.art_prompt_hints: warp entry audio sting, signature subsonic black-tide rumble with rising choral tension and gut-deep final drop on exit, legendary cinematic

items.name: Pilot Voice Old Military
items.description: Old-military pilot voice pack: clipped, procedural, radio-filter callouts for warp, dock, lock-on, and status.
items.flavor_text: Procedural voice. No wasted words. The radio earned its keep this shift.
items.art_prompt_hints: pilot voice pack, old military clipped procedural radio-filter callouts for warp dock lock-on status, disciplined vintage

items.name: Pilot Voice Southern Drawl
items.description: Southern-drawl pilot voice pack: warm, slow, unhurried callouts. Every line sounds like a friendly suggestion.
items.flavor_text: Even during a dogfight the voice sounds like it is finishing a coffee. Somehow, reassuring.
items.art_prompt_hints: pilot voice pack, southern drawl warm slow unhurried callouts for warp dock lock-on status, friendly grounded

items.name: Pilot Voice Gravelly Veteran
items.description: Gravelly-veteran pilot voice pack: weathered low voice with dry wit and occasional low chuckles between callouts.
items.flavor_text: Older than the ship. Probably older than the hangar. Still the best to fly with.
items.art_prompt_hints: pilot voice pack, gravelly veteran weathered low voice with dry wit and occasional low chuckles between callouts, grizzled warm

items.name: Pilot Voice Wry Trader
items.description: Wry-trader pilot voice pack: quick, mildly sarcastic callouts with an undertone of perpetual mild amusement.
items.flavor_text: The voice sells callouts like merchandise. Nobody returns them. They do not work.
items.art_prompt_hints: pilot voice pack, wry trader quick mildly sarcastic callouts with perpetual mild amusement, charming cheeky

items.name: Pilot Voice British Butler
items.description: British-butler pilot voice pack: measured, polite, slightly dry callouts. Every line implies a small unspoken deference.
items.flavor_text: Dock complete, sir. Target neutralized, sir. The voice would be pleased to confirm.
items.art_prompt_hints: pilot voice pack, british butler measured polite slightly dry callouts with implied unspoken deference, refined charming

items.name: Pilot Voice Russian Cosmonaut
items.description: Russian-cosmonaut pilot voice pack: authoritative, weighty, matter-of-fact callouts with a radio-degraded lo-fi filter.
items.flavor_text: The voice has flown before. Flown something worse. Still flying, regardless.
items.art_prompt_hints: pilot voice pack, russian cosmonaut authoritative weighty matter-of-fact callouts with radio-degraded lo-fi filter, vintage-space authoritative

items.name: Pilot Voice Robotic Monotone
items.description: Robotic-monotone pilot voice pack: flat synthetic callouts with zero inflection and a tiny digital artifact tail on each word.
items.flavor_text: The voice does not care. Never did. The voice is reliable because.
items.art_prompt_hints: pilot voice pack, robotic monotone flat synthetic callouts with zero inflection and tiny digital artifact tail, machine-cold

items.name: Pilot Voice Calm Scholar
items.description: Calm-scholar pilot voice pack: thoughtful, low-volume callouts with small metacommentary on combat conditions and warp outcomes.
items.flavor_text: The voice treats every duel as a footnote. The footnote is calm, precise, and winning.
items.art_prompt_hints: pilot voice pack, calm scholar thoughtful low-volume callouts with metacommentary on combat and warp outcomes, refined rare

items.name: Pilot Voice French Philosopher
items.description: French-philosopher pilot voice pack: wry, world-weary callouts with small existential observations between combat events.
items.flavor_text: The voice finds every duel absurd. The voice keeps winning anyway. Amused by it.
items.art_prompt_hints: pilot voice pack, french philosopher wry world-weary callouts with existential observations between combat events, literary epic

items.name: Pilot Voice Japanese Anime Hero
items.description: Japanese-anime-hero pilot voice pack: fully performed voice-acted callouts with dramatic timing, emotional peaks, and signature victory shouts.
items.flavor_text: The voice announces every lock-on like a television episode. Then delivers on the promise.
items.art_prompt_hints: pilot voice pack, japanese anime hero fully performed voice-acted callouts with dramatic timing emotional peaks and signature victory shouts, legendary theatrical
